title: First Packet Delay 300ms, Supports 20 Dialects: Tongyi Qianwen Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS Officially Opened
excerpt: Recently, the Alibaba Qwen team officially launched the new real-time speech synthesis model Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS, pushing speech synthesis from "being able to sp
content_html:
Recently, the Alibaba Qwen team officially launched the new real-time speech synthesis model Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS, pushing speech synthesis from "being able to speak" to "being able to express." The Plus version has ranked first globally in the Speech Arena, a prestigious global list by Artificial Analysis, outperforming mainstream models such as Gemini 3.1 TTS and ElevenLabs v3.

This release includes two versions: the Flash version is designed for real-time interaction with an initial latency of about 300ms, suitable for low-latency scenarios like smart assistants; the Plus version focuses on high-quality generation, offering better naturalness and voice similarity.

Four major breakthroughs in core capabilities:

First, multilingual and dialect coverage has been upgraded, supporting 16 languages, with the Plus version achieving an average speaker similarity of 82.75% across all 16 languages, ranking first in the industry. It also supports 20 Chinese dialects, avoiding the issue of "weakened dialect characteristics," making it more in line with native speakers' expressions.

Second, support for free-style natural language instructions allows users to generate corresponding speech accurately using natural language instructions like "gentle customer service tone" or "live-streaming host style," without requiring professional annotations.

Third, fine-grained tag control supports structured tags such as [gasp] and [angry], enabling precise control over non-verbal details like breathing and laughter, suitable for scenarios such as games and audiobooks.

Fourth, strong acoustic robustness, even if the reference audio contains high noise or reverberation, it can automatically filter out background noise while preserving voice quality, ensuring stable synthesis results.

The accompanying premium voice library covers various types of voices, including instructions, dialects, and small languages, supports 48K high-definition audio output (expected to be open on July 24th), and can synthesize up to 3 minutes of long text in a single session. The model is now fully available on the Alibaba Cloud BaiLian platform, allowing developers to access and experience it, jointly exploring new possibilities in voice interaction.

content_html_zh:
近日，阿里巴巴Qwen团队正式推出全新实时语音合成模型Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS，推动语音合成从“会说话”走向“会表达”。 Plus版本在Artificial Analysis全球权威榜单Speech Arena中排名全球第一，超越Gemini 3.1 TTS、ElevenLabs v3等主流模型。

本次发布包含两个版本：Flash版本，针对实时交互设计，初始延迟300ms左右，适合智能助手等低延迟场景； Plus版本专注于高质量生成，提供更好的自然度和语音相似度。

核心能力四大突破：

首先，多语言和方言覆盖升级，支持16种语言，Plus版本在所有16种语言中实现了平均说话人相似度82.75%，位居行业第一。 它还支持20种中文方言，避免了“方言特征弱化”的问题，使其更符合母语人士的表达方式。

其次，支持自由式自然语言指令，用户可以通过“温柔的客服语气”、“直播主播风格”等自然语言指令，准确生成对应的语音，无需专业注释。

第三，细粒度的标签控制，支持“喘息”、“愤怒”等结构化标签，可以精确控制呼吸、笑声等非语言细节，适用于游戏、有声读物等场景。

第四，声学鲁棒性强，即使参考音频含有高噪声或混响，也能在保持语音质量的同时自动滤除背景噪声，确保合成结果稳定。

附带的高级语音库涵盖指令、方言、小语种等各类语音，支持48K高清音频输出（预计7月24日开放），单次可合成长达3分钟的长文本。 该模型现已全面上线阿里云百联平台，供开发者接入体验，共同探索语音交互的新可能。
